selections.name: Stirrup Cup
selections.reason: Boasts the highest recent form rating (94) and overall rating (86) in the field. The uphill finish at Carlisle demands stamina, which this gelding has shown in recent 6F efforts.

selections.name: Harry's Halo
selections.reason: Solid form rating of 92 and has been running consistently. Drops slightly in class and should appreciate the testing final furlong.

selections.name: Pop Star
selections.reason: The 5/2 morning line favorite has a strong speed figure of 89. Has been competitive in similar handicaps and maps well from post 5.

selections.name: Rich Rhythm
selections.reason: Carries a respectable 87 form rating and draws well inside. Can stalk the pace and pick up pieces late if the early leaders tire on the hill.

danger_horse.name: Surprised
danger_horse.reason: Top weight but has back class and a solid 86 form rating. Capable of outrunning her 4/1 odds if she handles the weight.

selections.name: Light Of Dawn
selections.reason: First-time starter for top connections (Karl Burke / James Doyle). Heavily backed at 4/5 on the morning line, suggesting strong stable confidence.

selections.name: Deputy Vice
selections.reason: Posted an impressive 100 form rating and 96 overall in his debut. The main logical threat to the favorite with race experience under his belt.

selections.name: Capilano
selections.reason: Showed promise with a 96 form rating. Needs to improve slightly to beat the top two but is a clear factor for the exotics.

selections.name: Caeruleus
selections.reason: Lowest rated of the quartet with an 84 form rating. Will need a significant step forward or a pace meltdown to factor for the win.

selections.name: Pearl
selections.reason: Standout on paper with a 100 overall rating and 96 form. Even-money favorite who should relish the stiff mile test at Carlisle.

selections.name: Always Blue
selections.reason: Solid 93 overall rating and 92 form. Has shown enough ability to be the primary danger if the favorite falters.

selections.name: Marhayb
selections.reason: Holds a 92 form rating and gets a good draw in post 2. Can track the pace and use the uphill finish to her advantage.

selections.name: Foxy Night
selections.reason: Form rating of 82. Needs to find a bit more but is a logical inclusion for the bottom of the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Fair Isle Sioux
danger_horse.reason: Older mare with a 76 form rating. While outclassed on figures, her experience could net her a minor placing at a price.

selections.name: Auspicious
selections.reason: Top rated in the field with a 94 form rating and 87 overall. The 5/2 favorite draws well inside and has the tactical speed to navigate this trip.

selections.name: Battenburg Belle
selections.reason: Strong 89 form rating and gets the rail draw. Should save ground and be perfectly positioned for the uphill drag to the line.

selections.name: Mereside Spark
selections.reason: Carries top weight but has a respectable 83 form rating. The outside draw is tricky, but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Lanarra
selections.reason: Matches the 83 form rating and offers value at 7/2. Has shown flashes of ability that fit well in this handicap tier.

danger_horse.name: Truly Special
danger_horse.reason: Tied on form rating (83) with several others. If she can navigate the wide draw, she has the late kick to surprise at 15/1.

selections.name: We've Got This
selections.reason: Boasts the highest form rating (92) in the field. Draws perfectly in post 2 and has the stamina profile suited for the Carlisle mile.

selections.name: Epidavros
selections.reason: Top overall rating of 87 despite the wide draw and top weight. Class of the field and should be rolling late.

selections.name: Ravishing Beauty
selections.reason: Strong 90 form rating and gets the rail. Can secure a ground-saving trip and is a major threat at 10/1.

selections.name: Blufferonthebus
selections.reason: Consistent type with an 89 form rating. Maps well from post 4 and should be in the mix turning for home.

danger_horse.name: Music Academy
danger_horse.reason: Taking money at 4/1 with an 83 form rating. Lightly raced and open to improvement; dangerous if she takes a step forward.

selections.name: Style Of Life
selections.reason: Excellent 93 form and 92 overall rating. Gets the inside draw and has proven stamina, making her a prime candidate for the uphill finish.

selections.name: Krissy
selections.reason: Matches the top selection's 93 form rating and has a 91 overall. Draws well in post 2 and is a major win threat at 9/2.

selections.name: Amancio
selections.reason: Also boasts a 93 form rating. Consistent gelding who handles this distance well and should be right in the firing line.

selections.name: Star Cast
selections.reason: Highest form rating in the race at 99. If she can replicate her best recent effort, she is a massive danger despite the wider draw.

danger_horse.name: Concert Boy
danger_horse.reason: Carries bottom weight but has a strong 91 form rating. A live longshot at 12/1 who could blow up the exotics.

selections.name: Albeyours
selections.reason: Standout form rating of 93. The 7F trip with an uphill finish is perfect for her stamina profile. Overcomes the wide draw with late speed.

selections.name: Ideal Guest
selections.reason: The 5/2 favorite has a strong 91 form rating. Consistent performer who is the logical horse to beat on paper.

selections.name: Orbital Chime
selections.reason: Solid 89 form rating. Has the tactical ability to overcome the outside post and factor in the finish at 10/1.

selections.name: Jkr Cobbler
selections.reason: Form rating of 88 and fits well in this class. Should get a mid-pack trip and make a sustained run in the stretch.

danger_horse.name: Baby Rover
danger_horse.reason: Matches the 88 form rating and gets a great inside draw. At 7/1, she offers excellent value to hit the board.
